speaker: szarfman
text: I am not astonished that [FDA's data mining system] was unable to detect these signals.
context: Szarfman emailed FDA colleagues about CDC and FDA discussions on myocardial events and the lack of signals in VAERS, resending DuMouchel's RGPS analysis from one month earlier.
emphasis_words: I am not astonished that [FDA's data mining system] was unable to detect these signals.
